raw_consumer_statement: HELLO MY NAME IS XXXX XXXX, I AM WRITING THIS COMPLAINT BECAUSE I MADE A CLAIM FOR THE LOSS OF MY CREDIT CARD AND I REPORTED MULTIPLE TRANSACTIONS MADE IN A FRAUDULENT WAY, I PREVIOUSLY MADE THIS COMPLAINT BECAUSE THE BANK GAVE ME THE TEMPORARY CREDITS 4 TIMES AND ALSO DEBITED ME 4 TIMES THE SAME TEMPORARY CREDITS, IN THE END I NEVER RECEIVED THOSE CREDITS PERMANENTLY, IN THE SAME WAY THEY GAVE THEM TO ME THE SAME DAY THEY TOOK THEM AWAY, I DO NOT KNOW IF IT WAS AN ERROR OF THE AGENT WHO IS IN CHARGE OF THE CASE BUT IT IS IMPORTANT THAT MY ACCOUNT RECEIVES ATTENTION IMMEDIATELY, I HAVE ALREADY CALLED THE BANK SEVERAL TIMES TO TALK ABOUT THIS ISSUE, AND THE BANK TELLS ME THAT IN 24 TO 48 DAYS I WILL SEE THE CREDITS IN MY ACCOUNT, BUT THAT IS A LIE, I NEVER RECEIVE THOSE CREDITS, I HAVE ALSO ASKED ALL THE AGENTS I HAVE SPOKEN TO TO LEAVE NOTES ON THE SUBJECT BEING DISCUSSED SINCE THERE ARE SEVERAL TIMES THAT I HAVE TRIED TO RESOLVE THIS PROBLEM.
